1.desc: Inflicts damage on the target. It may also reduce the target's Defense by 1 level.

2.desc: Inflicts damage on the target with attacks that continue in a single turn until one misses. Its power rises after each hit, and it can last for a maximum of 5 attacks.

3.desc: Afflicts the targeted enemy with a Yawning status condition. A Pokémon with the Yawning status falls asleep sometime later.

4.desc: Afflicts all enemies within a 1-tile range with a Sleep status condition. A Pokémon with the Sleep status is incapable of action.

5.desc: Afflicts the targeted enemy with a Nightmare status condition. A Pokémon with the Nightmare status is incapable of action.

6.desc: Restores the HP of the user and team members on the floor. The HP amount regained depends on the weather.

302.desc: Boosts the user's Defense by 1 level.

303.desc: Inflicts damage on the target. It may also afflict the targeted enemy with a Cringe status condition, making its actions fail.

305.desc: Gives the user a Protect status. A Pokémon with the Protect status doesn't take damage from enemy attacks and moves and is also protected from the effects of moves.

315.desc: Resets any boosted evasiveness of the targeted enemy. It also afflicts a targeted Ghost-type Pokémon with an Exposed status condition.

348.desc: Gives the user a Skull Bash status, which causes the Pokémon to charge power for 1 turn, then try a powerful attack on the next turn. It also boosts the Pokémon's Defense while charging. You can't link this move.
